title: Essar Energy Transition Wins Government Backing for SAF Production Hub at Stanlow
content: Essar Energy Transition (EET), which plans to create the worldâ€™s leading low carbon process refinery, has been awarded Â£2.5m from the UK Governmentâ€™s Department for Transport (DfT), as part of its Advanced Fuels Fund (AFF) scheme, to develop its plans for the creation of one of the UKâ€™s largest advanced Sustainable Aviation Fuels (SAF) production hubs. Essar Energy Transition plans to establish a Methanol-to-Jet (MtJ) production hub capable of producing 200,000 tonnes per annum (tpa) of advanced SAF
author: Analysts Account
